title: Legacy001 controlled combo target encoding
summary: Extend the existing legacy-001 TargetEncoder combo list by a few tyre-strategy combinations, one controlled family at a time.
rationale: The parent only target-encodes Race+Compound and Race+Year. Pit behavior plausibly depends on compound, tyre age buckets, pit-stop state, and race-progress buckets, but target encoding can inflate CV if rare combinations are added indiscriminately.
implementation_hint: Patch only the existing important_combos/TargetEncoder section. Add a small controlled set such as Compound+TyreLife_cat_, Race+Compound+TyreLife_cat_, Race+Compound+PitStop_cat_, or Year+Compound+RaceProgress quantile bin. Keep TargetEncoder CV and smoothing, avoid high-cardinality unique identifiers, and preserve the parent folds and RealMLP model.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC by exposing interactions between compound, tyre age, race, and pit-stop state that are hard for the current encoded features to express.
risk: Target encoding can overfit validation through rare groups or too many added combinations, so the patch must stay small.
